summary: Comprehensive testing of 11 new features for K9 Command Kennel Operations Platform. Backend API tests: 24 passed, 2 skipped. Frontend UI tests: All pages loading correctly with expected functionality.

minor.issue: Fixed: Was using staff_id from request body instead of authenticated user's ID. Now correctly uses user.id

issues: Location dropdown shows 'Select location' even when editing existing booking - minor UX issue, location_id is set but dropdown may not show selected value immediately

seed_data_creation: Created test admin and staff users for UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 new features tested and working: 1) Staff Timesheet with clock in/out and modification requests, 2) Staff Bookings CRUD with modification_reason field, 3) Chat tabs (All/Staff/Customers), 4) Admin Timesheets with weekly totals Mon-Sun and modification request approval, 5) Shift scheduler CRUD, 6) Task completion tracking, 7) Customer CRUD, 8) Incident CRUD, 9) Time entry CRUD + approval. Booking edit 'not found' error is FIXED.

booking_edit_fix.notes: PATCH /bookings/{booking_id} endpoint working correctly, no 'not found' error

bug_fix_applied.issue: Clock-in endpoint was using staff_id from request body instead of authenticated user's ID
bug_fix_applied.fix: Changed to use user.id from authenticated user, ensuring clock-out can find the correct entry
